body: Again! Why you need a team in place! Where are you with Ollie?

subject: Re: privleged
body:
lots of reporters inquiries. !. do i think that trump set me up? what do i know about his dealings? did i speak to you? suggestion. all public record, house bought out of a bankruptcy proceding . I was the stalking horse bid. . never before was there a prosecution of erotic massage by women for money in someones home. every girl got money. returned . most interviewed by police over 21. all public record. . some concern on my team that i will get a cong subpoena. do i have to wear a tie?

--
